items.title: Gas and Plumbing Training Near Maidenhead
items.excerpt: Looking for gas or plumbing training near Maidenhead? Better Training Solutions runs ACS reassessment, water regulations, G3, and heat pump courses from High Wycombe.
items.content:
# Gas and Plumbing Training Near Maidenhead: Quality Courses Under 30 Minutes Away

If you're a gas engineer or plumber based in Maidenhead, you have local and nearby training options. Better Training Solutions in High Wycombe is a practical route to compare, especially if you want gas, plumbing and renewables courses from one centre with direct A404 access.

Better Training Solutions runs gas reassessment, plumbing, and heat pump courses from our centre at HP11 2LB. Maidenhead to High Wycombe is around 15 miles, 25 minutes via the A404 depending on traffic. Free parking is available on site, with no central London route needed.

## What Courses Can You Take?

We offer a practical set of qualifications for domestic gas engineers and plumbers who need to keep working, expand their offering, or move into renewable heating.

### Gas

**[ACS Reassessment (CCN1)](/course/ccn1-re-assessment/)** renews your registration every five years. Miss the deadline and your registration lapses, which means you can't legally work. We run reassessment courses regularly, so you can plan ahead.

### Plumbing

**[Water Regulations](/course/water-supply-water-fittings-regulations-1999/)** covers the Water Supply (Water Fittings) Regulations 1999. If you're installing or repairing water systems, the course helps evidence that you understand the compliance standards. [WRAS](https://www.wras.co.uk/) product approval is one part of the wider water regulations landscape.

**[Unvented Hot Water Systems (G3)](/course/unvented-hot-water-systems-safety/)** is a one-day course covering the safe installation, commissioning and maintenance of unvented cylinders. Required by Building Regulations Part G3.

**[Legionella Prevention](/course/legionella-prevention-and-water-treatment-managers/)** is another one-day qualification. Landlords and building managers are legally required to manage Legionella risk under ACOP L8, so the training fits well alongside other water compliance qualifications.

### Renewables

**[Heat Pump Training](/course/air-source-heat-pump-low-temperature-heating/)** is the five-day air source heat pump and low-temperature heating course. As low-carbon heating becomes more common, engineers who understand both traditional gas work and heat pump systems can keep a broader set of options open.

## Why Train in High Wycombe Instead of Heading to London?

Maidenhead engineers have options, including local providers and London centres. High Wycombe is worth considering when the course mix, dates and travel route suit you better than heading east.

- **A404 direct.** No M25, no congestion charge, no central London parking.
- **Free parking.** No daily parking fees eating into your training budget.
- **One training location.** Stack compatible courses at the same High Wycombe centre instead of travelling to different providers.

This is not a claim that BTS is the only or closest option for Maidenhead. It is a nearby High Wycombe route for engineers who want BTS's course mix and training environment.

## Getting Here From Maidenhead

The training centre is at 1 Marlborough Trading Estate, West Wycombe Road, High Wycombe, HP11 2LB.

**By car:** A404 north out of Maidenhead, straight to High Wycombe. About 25 minutes most of the day. Direct route, no junctions to mess with.

**By train:** Maidenhead to High Wycombe is around 35 minutes via Bourne End, or 45 minutes via Reading on the Elizabeth Line. Short taxi from High Wycombe station to the centre.

## Stack Your Qualifications in a Single Week

Three of our most popular courses are one-day qualifications: Water Regulations, Unvented G3, and Legionella Prevention. Book them back-to-back and you finish the week with three new qualifications. No travelling separately, no losing weeks of work.

For gas engineers wanting to add heat pumps, the five-day course can be planned as a focused training block alongside other qualifications.

## Who's This For?

Engineers based in:

- Maidenhead, Cookham, Bourne End
- Marlow, Henley-on-Thames
- Taplow, Burnham
- Reading, Wokingham (M4 corridor)
- Slough (M40/A404 connection)

Whether you're an established Gas Safe registered engineer, a plumber upskilling, or considering a career change into the trade, check the current BTS course list and dates before booking.

## Book a Course

Browse our [gas training courses](/our-gas-training-courses/) or [plumbing courses](/our-plumbing-training-courses/), or [contact us](/contact-us/) to ask about availability.

**Better Training Solutions**
1 Marlborough Trading Estate, West Wycombe Road, High Wycombe, HP11 2LB

items.title: Gas and Plumbing Training Near Milton Keynes
items.excerpt: Looking for gas or plumbing training near Milton Keynes? Better Training Solutions runs ACS reassessment, MLP, water regulations, G3, and heat pump courses from High Wycombe.
items.content:
# Gas and Plumbing Training Near Milton Keynes: ACS, Water Regs and Heat Pump Courses Within Reach

If you're a gas engineer or plumber working in Milton Keynes, High Wycombe is within reach when the course mix, dates and training environment make the journey worthwhile. Better Training Solutions is around 35 miles from central MK.

We run gas reassessment, MLP, water regulations, G3, Legionella, domestic cookers, domestic fires and heat pump courses from our centre at 1 Marlborough Trading Estate, HP11 2LB. Free parking is available on site.

## What Courses Are Available?

We cover a practical set of domestic gas, plumbing and renewables qualifications, from new entrant pathways through to specialist training.

### Gas

**[ACS Reassessment (CCN1)](/course/ccn1-re-assessment/)** renews your Gas Safe registration every five years. Run regularly throughout the year — book in advance and avoid the last-minute scramble.

**[Gas Managed Learning Programme (MLP)](/course/gas-managed-learning-programme/)** is the structured pathway for new entrants without prior gas experience. It takes you from zero through to ACS, with on-site experience built in. Practical, hands-on training rather than classroom theory.

### Plumbing

**[Water Regulations](/course/water-supply-water-fittings-regulations-1999/)** covers compliance with the Water Supply (Water Fittings) Regulations 1999. If you're working on water systems, the course helps evidence that you understand the regulations. [WRAS](https://www.wras.co.uk/) product approval is one part of the wider water regulations landscape.

**[Unvented Hot Water Systems (G3)](/course/unvented-hot-water-systems-safety/)** is a one-day course. Building Regulations Part G3 makes this qualification a legal requirement before you can work on unvented cylinders.

**[Legionella Prevention](/course/legionella-prevention-and-water-treatment-managers/)** is another one-day course. Landlords and commercial property managers are legally required to assess Legionella risk under ACOP L8.

### Renewables

**[Heat Pump Training](/course/air-source-heat-pump-low-temperature-heating/)** is the five-day air source heat pump and low-temperature heating course. As low-carbon heating becomes more common, the training can sit alongside gas qualifications for engineers who want a broader domestic heating skill set.

## Why High Wycombe From Milton Keynes?

Milton Keynes has direct local training options, so High Wycombe will not be the closest route for every engineer. Proximity matters, but so do dates, course mix and whether the training suits your next step.

- **Stackable one-day courses.** Combine multiple qualifications in a single week. Save the travel.
- **Free parking.** Park on site, no fees, no hassle.

## Getting Here From Milton Keynes

The training centre is at 1 Marlborough Trading Estate, West Wycombe Road, High Wycombe, HP11 2LB.

**By car:** M1 south to junction 13, then A421 / A41 / A413 across through Aylesbury, into High Wycombe. Or M40 from junction 6, faster but slightly longer. Around an hour either way.

**By train:** MK Central to High Wycombe is around an hour with one or two changes (typically via Aylesbury Vale Parkway or Marylebone). Short taxi from High Wycombe station.

## What's the Local Picture for Milton Keynes Engineers?

The MK area has demand for both gas servicing and renewable installation work. Future new-build work is expected to lean further toward low-carbon heating, while existing housing stock continues to require Gas Safe registered engineers for boiler servicing, breakdowns, and ACS compliance.

That dual market — traditional gas plus growing renewables — favours engineers who hold both sets of qualifications. Our courses are structured so you can build that combination without taking weeks off work.

## Stack Your Qualifications in a Week

The one-day plumbing courses are designed to be combined. Water Regulations, G3 Unvented, and Legionella Prevention can all be completed in three consecutive days. Add the five-day heat pump course as a separate focused block and you can build a broader qualification set without repeated travel.

For new entrants, the [MLP pathway](/course/gas-managed-learning-programme/) is structured around your existing schedule. You don't have to disappear from work for months.

## Who's This For?

Engineers based in:

- Milton Keynes, Bletchley, Newport Pagnell
- Stony Stratford, Wolverton, Olney
- Buckingham, Winslow
- Aylesbury, Tring, Leighton Buzzard
- North Buckinghamshire and south Bedfordshire generally

## Book a Course

Browse our [gas training courses](/our-gas-training-courses/) or [plumbing courses](/our-plumbing-training-courses/), or [contact us](/contact-us/) to check availability.

**Better Training Solutions**
1 Marlborough Trading Estate, West Wycombe Road, High Wycombe, HP11 2LB

items.title: GBP: Career Change Into Gas Engineering
items.excerpt: Draft GBP post about career change opportunities in gas engineering.
items.content: Thinking about a career change? Gas engineering is one of the few trades where demand is outstripping supply. Plumbing apprenticeship starts have dropped 37% since 2021. Over 44% of the existing workforce is over 55. The industry needs qualified people, and it needs them now. Our Gas Managed Learning Programme takes you from no experience through to Gas Safe registration. Structured, practical, hands-on. Based in High Wycombe, easy to reach from Reading, Aylesbury, Oxford, and anywhere along the M40. HP11 2LB. #CareerChange #GasEngineer #GasSafe #MLP #HighWycombe #Buckinghamshire #GasTraining

items.title: GBP: Plumber Skills Shortage News
items.excerpt: Draft GBP post about the plumber skills shortage and training opportunities.
items.content: The numbers speak for themselves. Plumbing apprenticeship starts have crashed 37%. 69% of firms can't find skilled workers. The UK needs over 40,000 new plumbers by 2033. If you're already qualified, your skills are more valuable than ever. If you're thinking about entering the trade, the timing couldn't be better. We run ACS initial training, water regulations, G3, and Legionella courses from High Wycombe. Small classes, trade-experienced assessors, qualifications that put you straight into a market that's crying out for people. HP11 2LB. #PlumbingTraining #SkillsShortage #GasTraining #ACS #HighWycombe #Buckinghamshire

items.title: GBP: Stack Your Qualifications
items.excerpt: Draft GBP post about stacking multiple qualifications in a single training week.
items.content: Water Regulations. G3 Unvented. Legionella Prevention. Three qualifications. Three days. All from our training centre in High Wycombe. Each one opens up new work. Water Regs proves you understand compliance. G3 lets you work on unvented cylinders legally. Legionella risk assessments are required by law for landlords, which means repeat work for you. Stack all three in a single week and walk away with qualifications that set you apart. No wasted travel. No waiting weeks between courses. HP11 2LB, free parking, easy reach from Reading, Aylesbury, and the M40 corridor. #PlumbingTraining #WaterRegulations #G3Training #Legionella #HighWycombe #Buckinghamshire
